title: Satik Kabit Sawayye Bhai Gurdas Ji De
gloss: Verses composed by B. Gurdas, a favourite of Guru Gobind Singh, the 10th Sikh Guru, with a commentary by B. Bishen Singh, Gyani.
publisher: The commentator and B. Chatar Singh Jiwan Singh, Book-sellers
notes: Large 587-page commentary volume. Note: Bhai Gurdas was companion of the early Gurus; catalogue's gloss attributes him to Guru Gobind Singh (10th).

title: Shangar Judh
gloss: A disputation in verse between a woman who wears jewelery and one who owns none.
notes: Publisher B. Matab Kaur (female publisher, Kairon) — same as Narki Gehna (p9 s34) and Dukhdai Gahne da Siapa (p8 s29); anti-ornament theme cluster.

author: Shankar Das, L.
title: Raja Hari Chand
gloss: Story noticed in entry No. 107 at page 19 of the catalogue for the quarter ending the 30th September 1908.
notes: [Previous edition noticed in entry No. 163 at page 12 of the catalogue for the quarter ending the 31st December 1909.] Cross-references: 1908Q3 entry 107; 1909Q4 entry 163.

author: Sundar Singh, B.
title: Guru ki Si
gloss: Verses in praise of Guru Gobind Singh, the 10th Sikh Guru.

author: Sundar Singh, B.
title: Nawan Qissa Sohani Nar Da
publisher: Sayad Muhammad Yusuf and Abdul Hakim, Book-sellers
notes: Author dash-continuation of serial 204. Muslim book-sellers publishing Sikh-press Punjabi verse; 4,000 copies.

author: Teju Ram, B.
title: Ramayan Baran Mah Samet
gloss: The story of Rama as related in the epic poem of Ramayana.
publisher: Bhai Sadhu Singh Sewa Singh, Book-sellers

title: Ustat Sri Amritsar Darbar Sahib Ji, Prasang Tiwin Khawand da Jhagra Sri Guru Arjan Sahib Ji ne Niberna, Dukh Bhanjani Sahib Pingle Ishnan Karna, Pingle da Sabat Hona, Sri Amristar Sahib Ji da Zahar Hona
gloss: Verses in praise of the Sikh temple at Amritsar, &c., &c.
notes: Long compound title on the Golden Temple and Guru Arjan legends.
